rules.note: policy-module dir watch, recursive, low churn

rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S setxattr -S lsetxattr -S fsetxattr -F 'auid>=1000' -F 'auid!=unset' -k mac-policy
rules.note: MAC-label setxattr syscalls, auid-narrowed; rare for unprivileged users (f3 3.5 LOW)

dominant_tier: MEDIUM (/etc/selinux dir watch); LOW (policy-module dir + setxattr syscalls)
rate_band_basis: f3 2.2/3.5/6: directory watches recursive but on low-churn policy trees -> LOW-MEDIUM; setxattr auid-narrowed and rare -> LOW. Mixed bytes (900 watch / 1200 syscall).
